tools.name: acoustic_fembem_periodic_pm_machine_artifact_gate
tools.title: Periodic PM Machine Artifact Gate
tools.description: Validates an attach-only shared MATLAB replay of a source-native unwrapped PM machine, including topology-aware half-turn antiperiodicity, rejection of a one-pole symmetry claim, physical-observable replay stability, and preserved session state.

summary_json.description: JSON metadata for an already executed shared-session PM-machine replay.
